name: @akaoio/zen
source: github:akaoio/zen (first-party — N2: not an external dependency)
note: Two entry points from one first-party package. zen.js is the browser/isomorphic build used for event signing (pair/sign/verify/recover, secp256k1) in both Node and browser. index.js is the Node mesh entry (pulls lib/server.js: yson/store/rfs/wire/axe/dht/serve) that powers the real ZEN graph transport (src/core/Sync/ZenTransport.js) and relay.js. lib/ is the Node runtime (non-minified); src/ holds the runtime .js modules those re-export (bootstrap.js is required by relay.js). The multi-GB *.wasm.o/*.zig build artifacts under the upstream src/ are intentionally excluded — they are compiler inputs, not runtime. pen.wasm ships for the PEN policy gate (deferred integration).
